metadata.description: Governed execution plugin. Internal spine: meta-unit doctrine. External metaphor: Three Departments + Six Ministries.

plugins.name: iostate
plugins.description: Governed execution plugin. Internal spine: meta-unit doctrine (元 / 组织镜像 / 节奏 / 意图放大 + 发牌). External metaphor: Three Departments + Six Ministries. v0.7.0 simplifies naming to the /iostate:* command family (draft, review, dispatch, deliver, verify, publish, allocate, emergency, stage-board, tool-trace) and removes all legacy 古风 command aliases.
